Class DownsideTriggerConfig

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside.DownsideTriggerConfig
public class DownsideTriggerConfig extends Object
Trigger conditions for activating downside management: threshold, decision method, and optional indicator/statistical rules for hybrid decisions.
